About Us

Downtown Miami's
Jewelry Makers

Nestled in Miami's legendary jewelry district — steps from the Seybold Building — 305 Miami Jewelry is where craftsmanship meets the soul of the 305. We don't just sell jewelry; we manufacture it. From custom engagement rings to bold statement pieces, every item is created with precision and passion.

Whether you're looking for a one-of-a-kind custom commission or a beautifully finished piece ready to wear, our team brings your vision to life. Walk in, and walk out with something made for you.

Miami Born & Built

What We Create

Every Piece, Crafted
to Perfection

From classic designs to fully custom commissions, we craft jewelry that lasts a lifetime.

Custom Rings
Engagement rings, wedding bands, fashion rings — designed around you, crafted to last.
Necklaces
Gold chains, pendants, and statement necklaces — bold pieces for confident people.
Bracelets
Tennis bracelets, bangles, link chains — from understated elegance to full statement.
Earrings
Studs, hoops, drops — every style, every metal, every occasion.
Custom Commissions
Have a vision? We manufacture it from scratch. Bring your sketch, photo, or idea.

The Craft

Manufactured
in Miami

We're not a reseller. 305 Miami Jewelry is a working jewelry manufacturer — every custom piece goes through our hands, from concept sketch to finished setting. When you commission a piece with us, you're getting real artisan craftsmanship, not catalog copies.

Located in downtown Miami's jewelry district — the same block where Miami's finest have sourced fine jewelry for decades — we combine old-world technique with modern design sensibility.
